11.response: {"Q0":"To see how people decide between actions and not doing anything so take risks versus play it safe."}

0.response: {"Q0":"When one of the astronauts left (in my case the astronaut in the red planet) I avoided working on finding gems entirely because I felt like I would wasting gold since I felt the chances to get blue gems were low since there was greater a chance of there being a rock on the blue planet as well the green gem revealing a rock or red gem which was worthless to me."}

7.response: {"Q0":"I searched less for gems since I felt I was more likely to get a worthless gem or rock."}

9.response: {"Q0":"Selecting galaxies became my main focus after one of the astronauts left one of the planets, I was less willing to waste gold to search through planets."}

8.response: {"Q0":"The disparity and different between bars so probability chances played a heavy role. But if both bars were relatively low or at least under 50% then I usually risked it and went with the larger reward even if it was lower probability."}
